delivery_mode_reason: Online judging is expected to consume one demo video URL plus live/repo links; build the product demo and pitch as one combined artifact.

hackathon.name: Arbitrum Open House London: Online Buildathon

frontend.framework_override_reason: Cloudflare deploy confidence and Durable Object state are higher priority than OpenNext adapter complexity for this build turn.
frontend.dependency_policy: runtime deps kept minimal; dev deps install with @latest/unversioned targets unless a compatibility bug is recorded
frontend.non_tailwind_visual_signature: policy flight-recorder HUD with red NO stamp, ledger rails, and evidence cells
frontend.hero_composition: cockpit workbench with action card, shock switches, and receipt rail
frontend.visual_differentiation_note: centers refusal evidence instead of charts, APY cards, chat bubbles, or wallet dashboards

qr_mobile_access.entry: QR code opens /app on the live Cloudflare Worker URL
qr_mobile_access.mobile_primary_flow: tap a shock, tap Let the agent try, open the latest receipt
qr_mobile_access.desktop_parity_plan: desktop shows policy, action, receipt rail, and proof hash simultaneously

asset_sources.logo: logo-generator style pack represented by hand-authored SVG files under public/brand
asset_sources.avatars: none; roles shown as holder, agent, auditor labels

cutout_assets.command: node hackathonhunter/scripts/cutout_assets.mjs public/art/raw --out public/art/cutouts --brief-dir public/art/briefs --usage "not used for RefusalRail app shell" --auto-key --trim

web3.chain: Arbitrum Sepolia primary fallback; Robinhood Chain when public deployment endpoint and funded wallet are available
web3.contract_evidence: contracts/*.sol compile with scripts/compile-contracts.mjs; deployed on Arbitrum Sepolia with refused demo tx 0x0b809bc31f75b6ff5947ccb5875dc5df975e1fe379b3a533f8e84454e42bf372
web3.wallet_flow: browser EIP-1193 sendTransaction path is optional and never gates the hero moment

required_env.name: PRIVATE_KEY
required_env.required_for: contract deployment only; Cloudflare hero path reads deployed addresses from Wrangler vars

required_env.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
required_env.required_for: real wrangler deploy from local machine; dry-run/build works without printing token

real_data_sources.evidence: receipt id and proof hash survive refresh and role switch

real_data_sources.source: Arbitrum Sepolia deployment and RefusalHub transaction
real_data_sources.evidence: RefusalHub deployed at 0x3540038833ae8750EfF20e7EfCaE16F206e90Cf8; refused demo tx 0x0b809bc31f75b6ff5947ccb5875dc5df975e1fe379b3a533f8e84454e42bf372

product_backbone.multi_user_proof: holder session creates receipts; auditor role can inspect public receipts from a second browser context

user_case_beats.beat: Judge selects a market shock and runs unsafe action
user_case_beats.state_change: receipt drawer shows refused status, proof hash, and NO stamp
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: POST /api/runs/refuse writes ownerId receipt in Durable Object storage

user_case_beats.user_case: Safe standing action executes under same policy
user_case_beats.state_change: allowed receipt appears with same policy hash and balance snapshot
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: POST /api/runs/safe writes allowed receipt in Durable Object storage

user_case_beats.state_change: proof table shows calldata hash, policy hash, shock snapshot, ownerId, and proof hash
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: GET /api/receipts/:id reads persisted receipt by id

prd_coverage.minimum: every P0/P1 REQ-### row has route/API/real-data/test/deploy evidence before recording

notes: Cloudflare Worker implementation intentionally replaces the default Next/OpenNext path to maximize deploy confidence. The app now ships a live Worker URL, Durable Object storage, deployed contracts, and a real refused demo transaction.
